checks.name: health_index_bounds
checks.detail: Health index is bounded to 0..100 for public-facing charts.

checks.name: nonnegative_rul
checks.detail: Predicted proxy RUL is clipped at zero cycles.

checks.name: incident_rows_present
checks.detail: Incident windows are available for retrieval and report evidence.

notes: Raw NASA capacity-like values are preserved in artifacts for provenance.
Reviewer-facing charts use health_index_pct to avoid overclaiming physical units.
